headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 16, 2026**
article:
The Arizona Diamondbacks secured a crucial 8-5 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Adrian Del Castillo leading the offense. Kevin Ginkel pitched 2 scoreless innings, striking out 4 batters. In other action, the St. Louis Cardinals edged the Cleveland Guardians 5-3, and the Boston Red Sox dominated the Minnesota Twins 9-5.

Injuries and availability have impacted several teams. Chris Martin has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right shoulder impingement, joining Luis Curvelo (right biceps strain) and Cody Bradford (left elbow surgery rehab) on the Texas Rangers' injured list. Jared Young (left meniscus tear) has been placed on the 10-day injured list for the New York Mets, while Kyle Freeland (left shoulder inflammation) and Cody Bolton (no specified injury) have been placed on the 15-day injured list for the Colorado Rockies and Houston Astros, respectively.

Several trades and roster moves have taken place. The Philadelphia Phillies traded RHP Griff McGarry to the Los Angeles Dodgers in exchange for Future Considerations and International Bonus Pool Money. The Baltimore Orioles acquired 1B Christian Encarnacion-Strand from the Cincinnati Reds for cash, while the Chicago White Sox traded 2B Lenyn Sosa to the Toronto Blue Jays for OF Jordan Rich and Future Considerations.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Take Down Orioles 8-5**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks secured an 8-5 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Adrian Del Castillo leading the offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 5 RBIs. Kevin Ginkel pitched 2 scoreless innings, striking out 4 batters.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Take Down Guardians 5-3**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals secured a 5-3 victory over the Cleveland Guardians, with Dustin May earning the win. Alec Burleson led the Cardinals' offense with 2 hits and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Red Sox Take Down Twins 9-5**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox secured a 9-5 victory over the Minnesota Twins, with Trevor Story leading the offense. Story's impressive performance included 2 hits, 1 home run, and 5 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Royals Fall Short in Detroit**
top_news.summary: The Kansas City Royals dropped a 1-2 decision to the Detroit Tigers, with Wenceel Pérez leading the Royals' offense with a home run and an RBI. Seth Lugo pitched 6.2 innings for the Royals, striking out 7 batters and allowing 1 earned run.

top_news.title: **Rangers Place Chris Martin on 15-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Texas Rangers right-handed pitcher Chris Martin has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right shoulder impingement.

top_news.title: **Phillies Make Roster Move Ahead of Opening Day**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies have made a trade, sending RHP Griff McGarry to the Los Angeles Dodgers in exchange for Future Considerations and International Bonus Pool Money.
